summary: Complete frontend testing of Pioneer XDJ-RX3 style DJ controller. All major features implemented and working perfectly including large jog wheels, performance pads, central mixer, waveform displays, and transport controls.
passed_tests: Pioneer DJ app loads successfully with proper intro animation
Both Pioneer Decks (A & B) render correctly
Large jog wheels with rainbow centers and LED rings working
Interactive jog wheel dragging and rotation functional
All 8 colorful performance pads (Red, Orange, Blue, Green) present
All 4 pad modes working (HOT CUE, BEAT LOOP, SLIP LOOP, BEAT JUMP)
Performance pad clicking and mode switching functional
Central mixer with CH1/CH2 channel strips implemented
Master and Booth volume controls present and working
Headphone mixing and level controls functional
Sound Color FX buttons (SPACE, FILTER, CRUSH, NOISE) all clickable
Waveform displays showing proper BPM (128) and beat grid
Loop controls with all size buttons (1,2,4,8,16,32) working
SYNC and KEY lock buttons present and functional
Tempo/pitch sliders with percentage display working
SLIP, QUANTIZE, VINYL mode buttons functional
Deck switching (A/B) with visual feedback working
Keyboard shortcuts working (A/B selection, spacebar, Q/W, arrows)
Help modal accessible with keyboard shortcut (?)
Station browser modal opens and closes properly
Recording functionality accessible via 'R' key
Professional Pioneer XDJ-RX3 styling and layout
Responsive design with proper color coding
All EQ knobs (TRIM, HI, MID, LOW) visible with values
COLOR FX knobs implemented
Crossfader control working with keyboard navigation
success_percentage: frontend: 100% - All Pioneer XDJ-RX3 features implemented and working correctly
